data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies navigation by reducing choices to enhance user decision speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interaction design supports easy clickable targets proportional to their size and proximity.
data.technical_spec: Larger buttons for frequently used actions.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Visually appealing designs enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language and high-quality images.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Organizes product categories to help users process information effectively.
data.technical_spec: Grouping similar items into intuitive categories.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adopts familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent site navigation similar to known interfaces.
